calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:15am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Linda Katherine Donovan, appears through counsel, Nathan Kabanuck; Respondent, Xiao Yan Li, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld. Connie Lei, informal Cantonese Interpreter appears to help Ms. Li translate Cantonese/English.
EXH(R) H: Report re Ms. Li's medical condition
Appellant's trial brief filed, includes exhibits A-G
2 declarations filed: Linda Donovan & Katherine Donovan
An exhibit was taken from the Respondent but not identified
10:45am
Matter is submitted. Evidence is retained

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Judgment Entered
